sharingOwnerRules.description: Provides Read Only access to HCP Facility records owned by the Director of Sales to the Field Sales role.
sharingOwnerRules.label: HCP Facility: Dir of Sales to Field Sales(Read)

sharingOwnerRules.description: Grants Read/Write access to HCP Facility records owned by the Director of Sales to the Inside Sales Manager and subordinates.
sharingOwnerRules.label: HCP Facility: Dir of Sales to Inside Sales(RW)

sharingOwnerRules.description: Shares HCP Facility records owned by the Director of Sales with the Sales Ops public group (Read/Write).
sharingOwnerRules.label: HCP Facility: Dir of Sales to Sales Ops(RW)
